login.title: AlwaysPrint Cloud Manager
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: If the email exists in the system, you'll receive instructions in a few minutes.
forgotPassword.error: An error occurred. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Redirecting to sign in...
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid link. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.expiredLink: Link expired. Please request a new one.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign out and sign in again.
dashboard.connectionError: Connection error. Backend is not responding.
dashboard.loadError: Error loading statistics. Please try again.

workstations.title: Workstations
workstations.subtitle: Manage workstations connected to the system
workstations.accountAutoNote: Note: Account assignment can also be done automatically when the workstation connects from a registered public IP.
workstations.emptyMessage: Workstations will appear here when they connect to the system.
workstations.emptyFilterMessage: No workstations found matching those search criteria.

vlans.title: VLANs
vlans.subtitle: Manage your organization's network segments
vlans.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description or CIDR...
vlans.emptyMessage: No VLANs found matching that criteria
vlans.emptyCreate: Start by creating a new VLAN
vlans.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete VLAN {name}? This action cannot be undone.

messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Send messages to workstations, VLANs or the entire organization
messages.emptyMessage: Start by sending a message to your workstations

config.title: Configuration
config.subtitle: Manage system configuration at different levels
config.orgDesc: Configuration applied to all workstations in an organization
config.hierarchyMsg: This configuration applies at the organization level. It can be overridden by VLAN or workstation configuration.
config.corpQueueHelper: Name of the corporate print queue in Windows
config.pollingHelper: Frequency at which workstations check for pending tasks (1-1440 min)
config.printerIpsHelper: Specific IPs where to search for available printers
config.printerRangesHelper: CIDR ranges to search for printers
config.noConfigMsg: This organization doesn't have a global configuration yet. Complete the form and save to create the initial configuration.
config.selectOrgMsg: Select an organization from the selector above to view or edit its configuration.
config.systemConfigMsg: This configuration applies to all organizations. Each organization can override these values.

audit.title: Audit
audit.subtitle: Complete record of all actions performed in the system
audit.emptyFilterMessage: No records found matching that criteria

users.title: Users
users.subtitle: Manage system users
users.selfDeactivateNote: For security reasons, you cannot change your own user's status.
users.timezoneNote: If no timezone is specified, the user will inherit their organization's timezone ({timezone}). Admins without an organization will use UTC by default.
users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete user {name} ({email})?
users.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All data associated with the user will be lost.

accounts.title: Organizations
accounts.subtitle: Manage organizations using the system (BBVA, Ripley, etc.)
accounts.timezoneHelper: Users of this organization will inherit this timezone by default
accounts.languageHelper: New users of this organization will start with this language
accounts.emptyCreate: Start by creating the first account.
accounts.emptyFilter: No accounts found matching that search criteria.
accounts.noIps: No public IPs registered for this account.
accounts.noIpsSuggestion: Add IPs so workstations are automatically assigned.
accounts.autoAssignNote: Auto-assignment: When a workstation connects from one of these public IPs, it will be automatically assigned to this account.
accounts.deleteAccountConfirm: Delete account "{name}"? This will delete all users, workstations and configurations. Cannot be undone.
accounts.deleteIpConfirm: Delete IP {ip}? Workstations connecting from this IP will no longer be automatically assigned.

pendingIps.title: Pending Public IPs
pendingIps.subtitle: Authorize or reject IPs from which clients attempted to connect
pendingIps.emptyMessage: All IPs have been authorized or rejected.
pendingIps.emptyFilter: No IPs found matching that search criteria.
pendingIps.rejectConfirm: Are you sure you want to reject IP {ip}? This action cannot be undone.
